items: Provisioning of Business Data Cloud : SAP Hana Cloud

The blog highlights key features and enhancements introduced in the March releases of SAP Datasphere and SAP Business Data Cloud. It also provides links to community news blogs and a webinar series titled 'The Next Era of Business Data.'

The blog provides a detailed guide on implementing Single Sign-On (SSO) for SAP Datasphere using SAP Cloud Identity Services. It focuses on leveraging the SAP Identity Authentication Service (IAS) in integration with OKTA for seamless authentication.

body.headline: The blog outlines ten compelling reasons to rely on the SAP Business Transformation Center for critical ERP data migrations.

items: The blog outlines ten compelling reasons to rely on the SAP Business Transformation Center for critical ERP data migrations. It highlights its capabilities in ensuring secure, efficient, and reliable migration processes. This tool is positioned as a trusted solution for complex transformation projects.
SAP Datasphere News in December
SAP Datasphere News in December

The blog post discusses the challenges users face with the calculation logic in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC), particularly when features behave inconsistently. It introduces a collective KBA that compiles the latest known limitations of Story Calculations to assist users in navigating these issues.

body.headline: This blog post provides a step-by-step guide to activating the Object Store in SAP Datasphere.

items: This blog post provides a step-by-step guide to provisioning SAP BDC Connect for seamless data sharing with Databricks. It covers prerequisites like admin permissions, regional alignment, and enabling Unity Catalog and Delta Sharing, followed by configuration steps in SAP for Me and Databricks. The guide ensures successful connection setup and validation for data product sharing between SAP Business Data Cloud and Databricks.
SAP Datasphere News in October

This blog post provides a step-by-step guide to activating the Object Store in SAP Datasphere. It covers key limitations, requirements, supported regions, and deployment considerations like space creation and capacity units. The guide ensures a clear understanding of the activation process.
Is it possible to configure scoped roles from SAP Datasphere in SAP Cloud Identity Service?
SAP Datasphere News in October

The blog provides a step-by-step guide to importing data from an on-premise MS SQL Server into SAP Analytics Cloud. It emphasizes using the SAP Analytics Cloud Agent and SAP Cloud Connector on a dedicated server for optimal performance and multi-user access. Best practices for setup are also discussed.

body.headline: The blog demonstrates an end-to-end process of integrating SAP BW data with Databricks Enterprise via SAP Business Data Cloud without requiring data movement.

items: The blog demonstrates an end-to-end process of integrating SAP BW data with Databricks Enterprise via SAP Business Data Cloud without requiring data movement. It highlights how this setup enables quick application of ML and AI on SAP BW data.

The blog post provides a curated list of SAP TechEd virtual sessions focused on building an AI-ready data strategy. It targets engineers, scientists, and analysts looking to enhance their expertise in business data cloud solutions. The recommendations aim to help attendees maximize their learning experience during the event.
